title: Volunteer Waiver & Release
description: Waiver form for volunteer support, clarifying lack of compensation and releasing organizers from liability.
whatsCovered: Waiver of salary, benefits, and worker compensation rights
Assumption of safety risks during volunteer work
Release of organization from general negligence claims
Use of volunteer photos in marketing materials
Volunteer agreement to follow safety coordinator instructions
whenToUse: Use this waiver when bringing volunteers to support charity drives, public events, or construction builds.

clauses.heading: VOLUNTEER WAIVER & RELEASE
clauses.body: This agreement or policy (the "Agreement") is executed as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {party_a_name}, residing/located at {party_a_address} ("First Party"), and {party_b_name}, residing/located at {party_b_address} ("Second Party").

clauses.heading: 1. Core Framework
clauses.body: This agreement establishes the legal rights, bylaws, transfers, waivers, or consent structures for the Volunteer Waiver & Release. The parties agree to adhere to the terms and declarations set out below.

clauses.heading: 2. Worker Compensation Waivers
clauses.body: Volunteer agrees to support {organization_name} on a voluntary unpaid basis. Volunteer waives worker compensation rights.

clauses.heading: General Legal Terms
clauses.body: This document constitutes the entire understanding between the parties. Any amendments must be made in writing and executed by both parties.

clauses.heading: Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: Can I customize this legal template?
faq.answer: Yes, you can edit this template using the online editor, and add custom schedules or exhibits.

faq.question: Is this agreement binding?
faq.answer: Yes, once signed by all parties, it becomes a legally binding contract under state laws.
